recommended_external_plugins.name: superpowers
recommended_external_plugins.purpose: Planning, test-driven development, debugging, code review, and branch-finishing workflows for coding agents.
recommended_external_plugins.use_when: Recommend when the owner uses a supported agent platform and the plugin is not already visible in the current agent environment or project platform config.

platforms.install_action: Install Superpowers from the Codex plugin marketplace.
detection_evidence: Superpowers appears in installed Codex plugins or available skills.
Project or environment guidance already says Superpowers is installed.
platforms.verification: Confirm Superpowers appears in Codex plugins or available skills.

detection_evidence: Claude Code plugin list includes Superpowers.
Superpowers skills are already available in the Claude Code session.
platforms.verification: Confirm Claude Code lists the Superpowers plugin or a fresh session recognizes Superpowers.

platforms.install_action: Run /plugin install superpowers@claude-plugins-official in codeagent-cli if its Claude-compatible plugin command is available.
detection_evidence: codeagent-cli plugin list includes Superpowers.
Superpowers skills are already available in the codeagent-cli session.
Project-local codeagent-cli configuration exists under .cac/.
platforms.verification: Confirm codeagent-cli lists the Superpowers plugin or a fresh session recognizes Superpowers.

platforms.install_action: Add "superpowers@git+https://github.com/obra/superpowers.git" to the plugin array in opencode.json or .opencode.yaml, matching the target project's existing OpenCode config file.
detection_evidence: opencode.json already references superpowers.
.opencode.yaml already references superpowers.
OpenCode skill list includes Superpowers skills.
platforms.verification: Confirm OpenCode loads the plugin and lists the Superpowers skills.

recommended_external_plugins.name: deveco-cli
recommended_external_plugins.purpose: HarmonyOS, OpenHarmony, ArkUI, and ArkTS project tooling for build, run, device/emulator access, hilog logs, local HarmonyOS docs, DevEco skills, and MCP syntax-check integration.
recommended_external_plugins.use_when: Recommend by default when repository evidence or owner input indicates a HarmonyOS, OpenHarmony, ArkUI, ArkTS, DevEco Studio, DevEco Toolbox, deveco-toolbox, @deveco-codegenie/mcp, ohpm, hvigor, hdc, hilog, or devecocli application and the DevEco CLI is not already available.

default_recommendation.recommend_by_default_when: HarmonyOS/OpenHarmony/ArkUI/ArkTS evidence is detected, including oh-package.json5, build-profile.json5, module.json5, app.json5, hvigorfile.*, @deveco/deveco-cli, devecocli, DevEco Studio, DevEco Toolbox, deveco-toolbox, @deveco-codegenie/mcp, ohpm, hdc, hilog, or emulator tooling.

platforms.install_action: Run npm install -g @deveco/deveco-cli@latest after user approval, then optionally run devecocli init --agent codex or devecocli init --mcp --agent codex --project <target-project> only with separate approval.
detection_evidence: HarmonyOS manifests such as oh-package.json5, build-profile.json5, module.json5, or app.json5 exist in the target project.

Project files mention DevEco Studio, DevEco Toolbox, deveco-toolbox, deveco-mcp-server, @deveco-codegenie/mcp, devecocli, @deveco/deveco-cli, ohpm, hvigor, hdc, hilog, emulator, ArkUI, ArkTS, HarmonyOS, or OpenHarmony.
devecocli --version succeeds in the current environment.
Owner confirms the project is a HarmonyOS/OpenHarmony/ArkUI/ArkTS application.
platforms.verification: Confirm devecocli --version succeeds, then use devecocli docs search or devecocli --help to verify local command availability without modifying the project.

platforms.install_action: Run npm install -g @deveco/deveco-cli@latest after user approval, then optionally run devecocli init --agent claude or devecocli init --mcp --agent claude --project <target-project> only with separate approval.
detection_evidence: HarmonyOS manifests such as oh-package.json5, build-profile.json5, module.json5, or app.json5 exist in the target project.

Project files mention DevEco Studio, DevEco Toolbox, deveco-toolbox, deveco-mcp-server, @deveco-codegenie/mcp, devecocli, @deveco/deveco-cli, ohpm, hvigor, hdc, hilog, emulator, ArkUI, ArkTS, HarmonyOS, or OpenHarmony.
devecocli --version succeeds in the current environment.
Owner confirms the project is a HarmonyOS/OpenHarmony/ArkUI/ArkTS application.
platforms.verification: Confirm devecocli --version succeeds, then use devecocli docs search or devecocli --help to verify local command availability without modifying the project.

platforms.install_action: Run npm install -g @deveco/deveco-cli@latest after user approval, then use codeagent-cli's Claude-compatible .cac skill layout or adapt generated Claude assets into .cac only with separate approval.
detection_evidence: HarmonyOS manifests such as oh-package.json5, build-profile.json5, module.json5, or app.json5 exist in the target project.

Project files mention DevEco Studio, DevEco Toolbox, deveco-toolbox, deveco-mcp-server, @deveco-codegenie/mcp, devecocli, @deveco/deveco-cli, ohpm, hvigor, hdc, hilog, emulator, ArkUI, ArkTS, HarmonyOS, or OpenHarmony.
Project-local codeagent-cli configuration exists under .cac/.
devecocli --version succeeds in the current environment.
Owner confirms the project is a HarmonyOS/OpenHarmony/ArkUI/ArkTS application.
platforms.verification: Confirm devecocli --version succeeds, then use devecocli docs search or devecocli --help to verify local command availability without modifying the project.

platforms.install_action: Run npm install -g @deveco/deveco-cli@latest after user approval, then optionally run devecocli init --agent opencode or devecocli init --mcp --agent opencode --project <target-project> only with separate approval.
detection_evidence: HarmonyOS manifests such as oh-package.json5, build-profile.json5, module.json5, or app.json5 exist in the target project.

recommended_external_plugins.name: opencli
recommended_external_plugins.purpose: Website and browser automation, structured web extraction, and development or repair of reusable OpenCLI adapters through upstream-managed CLI and agent skills.
recommended_external_plugins.use_when: Offer by default when a supported agent platform is detected or requested. Use after owner approval for website automation, browser-backed extraction, or OpenCLI adapter workflows.

default_recommendation.recommend_by_default_when: A supported platform is detected or requested during Agent Seed activation.

platforms.install_action: After user approval, run npm install -g @jackwener/opencli, then run npx skills add jackwener/opencli. For browser-backed work, separately ask the owner to manually install the OpenCLI Browser Bridge extension; do not install browser extensions automatically.
detection_evidence: opencli --version succeeds in the current environment.
OpenCLI skills are already visible to the Codex session or project.
platforms.verification: Confirm opencli --version succeeds and Codex recognizes the installed OpenCLI skills. Run opencli doctor only after the owner authorizes a browser-bridge diagnostic.

platforms.install_action: After user approval, run npm install -g @jackwener/opencli, then run npx skills add jackwener/opencli. For browser-backed work, separately ask the owner to manually install the OpenCLI Browser Bridge extension; do not install browser extensions automatically.
detection_evidence: opencli --version succeeds in the current environment.
OpenCLI skills are already visible to the Claude Code session or project.
platforms.verification: Confirm opencli --version succeeds and Claude Code recognizes the installed OpenCLI skills. Run opencli doctor only after the owner authorizes a browser-bridge diagnostic.

platforms.install_action: After user approval, run npm install -g @jackwener/opencli, then run npx skills add jackwener/opencli. For browser-backed work, separately ask the owner to manually install the OpenCLI Browser Bridge extension; do not install browser extensions automatically.
detection_evidence: opencli --version succeeds in the current environment.
OpenCLI skills are already visible to the codeagent-cli session or project.
platforms.verification: Confirm opencli --version succeeds and codeagent-cli recognizes the installed OpenCLI skills. Run opencli doctor only after the owner authorizes a browser-bridge diagnostic.

platforms.install_action: After user approval, run npm install -g @jackwener/opencli, then run npx skills add jackwener/opencli. For browser-backed work, separately ask the owner to manually install the OpenCLI Browser Bridge extension; do not install browser extensions automatically.
detection_evidence: opencli --version succeeds in the current environment.
OpenCLI skills are already visible to OpenCode through opencode.json, .opencode.yaml, or its loaded skill list.
platforms.verification: Confirm opencli --version succeeds and OpenCode recognizes the installed OpenCLI skills from opencode.json, .opencode.yaml, or its loaded skill list. Run opencli doctor only after the owner authorizes a browser-bridge diagnostic.
